lint.note: 694 pre-existing errors, 60 warnings — zero new errors from worldview files

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that mission-created files (worldLabsService.ts, worldview-store.ts, WorldviewSection.tsx, etc.) are modifiable in subsequent milestones. The current wording 'Do NOT modify existing services (src/services/) — only create the new worldLabsService.ts' was written for the foundation milestone and doesn't account for polish/fix milestones where mission-created files need updating.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The misc-scrutiny-fixes feature correctly modified src/services/worldLabsService.ts to add imageUrl parameter to generateWorld(), which technically conflicts with the AGENTS.md boundary. The worker proceeded correctly — the boundary needs rewording.

rejectedObservations.observation: Edge function generateBody object has inconsistent indentation after refactoring to support conditional image_url field
rejectedObservations.reason: Cosmetic indentation in a Deno edge function file that isn't covered by the project's prettier/eslint formatting pipeline. Too minor and localized to warrant a shared state update.
